question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: Medium: Shutdown of greater than or equal to 30% of network processing nodes without brute force actions, but does not shut down the network'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a balance file that causes the HashMap.newHashMap(batchSize) for token balances to experience excessive hash collisions due to crafted token IDs, degrading HashMap performance to O(n) and causing the parse operation to time out on >= 30% of nodes?
